summary: Schedule page (formerly Log tab) tested. All core features work correctly. Tab bar shows 'Schedule' with calendar-month icon. Weekly calendar grid, week navigation, session cards, expand/collapse, swap mode banner all functional. Today (Apr 12 = Sunday) is a REST day in seed data so GO TO SESSION button could not be tested directly.

test_results.tab_bar_shows_schedule_not_log: PASS - Tab bar has 'Schedule' with calendar-month-outline icon (testID: tab-schedule)
test_results.schedule_page_loads_no_crash: PASS - Page loads cleanly with 7-day grid
test_results.day_cards_7_visible: PASS - MON TUE WED THU FRI SAT SUN all rendered
test_results.day_card_color_coding: PASS - MON Apr 6 RED/completed, SUN Apr 12 gray/REST (today is rest day), upcoming days GREEN
test_results.this_week_badge: PASS - Gold 'THIS WEEK' badge visible on current week
test_results.week_navigation: PASS - Right arrow changed week from Apr 6-12 to Apr 13-19
test_results.week_stats_pills: PASS - Sessions 1/4, Volume 6.5k lb, Avg Effort 7.0 all shown
test_results.completed_session_red_checkmark: PASS - Heavy Lower (Mon Apr 6) shows red check icon with Sets/Vol/Effort stats
test_results.expand_completed_session: PASS - Clicking Heavy Lower expands to show Box Squat with set pills (—×10, 150×5, 200×2)
test_results.upcoming_sessions_green_label: PASS - Upcoming sessions show green 'Upcoming' label
test_results.swap_days_banner: PASS - Clicking 'Swap days' shows gold banner 'Tap two training days to swap them'
test_results.swap_cancel: PASS - Cancel dismisses the swap banner
test_results.go_to_session_button: NOT TESTED - Today (Apr 12 = Sunday) is a REST day in seed data, no session scheduled. Feature logic looks correct in code.
test_results.no_crashes: PASS - No red screens or errors observed

action_items: Optional: Verify GO TO SESSION button + navigation to Today tab manually when a session is scheduled on current day (e.g., advance system date or use test data with today's date)
critical_code_review_comments: Missing testID attributes on key interactive elements: day cards, session cards, GO TO SESSION button, week nav arrows, Swap days button. Should add testID for automated testing reliability.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data (POST /api/seed returned 'already seeded')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule page replaces Log tab. Seed data has sessions on Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri for weeks. Today Apr 12 is Sunday=REST so GO TO SESSION button won't appear. To test GO TO SESSION, need a day with scheduled session as today.
